results.title: CodeRabbit
results.description: CodeRabbit is an AI-powered code review tool that helps development teams improve code quality and accelerate the review process through intelligent feedback on code changes.

results.title: CodeRabbit
results.description: CodeRabbit is an AI-powered code review tool that provides context-aware, human-like feedback on pull requests, learning from team preferences to accelerate software development.

results.title: Apache Jackrabbit
results.description: Apache Jackrabbit is a fully conforming implementation of the Content Repository for Java Technology API (JCR), providing a hierarchical content store with advanced features like search, versioning, and transactions.

results.title: @coderabbitai/bitbucket
results.description: CodeRabbit's TypeScript API client for connecting to Bitbucket Cloud and Bitbucket Data Center. This client is auto-generated from Bitbucket's OpenAPI schemas.

results.title: CodeRabbit Dotfiles
results.description: CodeRabbit Dotfiles provides an optimized development environment managed by Chezmoi, featuring highly configured Zsh, Tmux, and Neovim setups with AI integration for modern language development.

results.title: Grabbit
results.description: Grabbit is a Golang wrapper for RabbitMQ managed connections, providing auto-reconnection support, shared connections, channel auto-recovery, and flexible consumer/publisher configurations.

results.title: mrab-regex
results.description: A Python library for regular expression matching, offering advanced features and utilities for complex pattern searching.

results.title: Vowpal Wabbit
results.description: Vowpal Wabbit is a fast, online machine learning system focused on techniques like hashing, allreduce, and reinforcement learning, designed for performance and scalability with a bounded memory footprint.

results.title: Octocrab
results.description: Octocrab is a modern, extensible third-party GitHub API client written in Rust, designed for building GitHub integrations or bots with high-level strongly typed and lower-level HTTP APIs.

results.title: Rybbit
results.description: 🐸 Rybbit - open-source and privacy-friendly alternative to Google Analytics that is 10x more intuitive.

results.title: Cuprite
results.description: Cuprite is a pure Ruby driver for Capybara that enables running Capybara tests on headless Chrome or Chromium using the Chrome DevTools Protocol via Ferrum.

results.title: Bitbybit
results.description: Bitbybit is an open-source platform providing core 3D algorithms and packages for geometry programming, with integrations for BabylonJS, ThreeJS, JSCAD, Manifold, and OCCT kernels.

results.title: cuRobo
results.description: cuRobo is a CUDA accelerated library offering a suite of robotics algorithms for fast, collision-free motion generation, kinematics, collision checking, and numerical optimization.

results.title: cocotb
results.description: cocotb is a coroutine-based cosimulation testbench environment for verifying VHDL and SystemVerilog RTL designs using Python.

results.title: Cocotb
results.description: cocotb is a framework that enables users to write VHDL and Verilog testbenches using Python.

results.title: Corax CoLAB
results.description: Corax CoLAB builds AI-driven ecosystems and cyber-physical systems, including the GAP Platform and GAPbot, that integrate advanced robotics, Edge AI, and sustainability strategies to streamline resource utilization, secure data, and reduce operating costs for organizations.

results.title: CodeLLDB
results.description: CodeLLDB is a VS Code debugger extension powered by LLDB that provides advanced debugging capabilities for C++, Rust, and other compiled languages with features like conditional breakpoints, data visualization, and remote debugging.

results.title: Logger JS
results.description: A high-performance, multi-transport logging library for Node.js and browser environments with first-class TypeScript support, featuring multiple levels, structured logging, and various transports like Console, NDJSON, Loki, and Syslog.

results.title: covdbg
results.description: covdbg is a C++ code coverage solution for Windows that uses advanced binary instrumentation to analyze executables without source code changes or rebuilds, providing minimal overhead and powerful integrations.

results.title: Cubitt
results.description: Cubitt is a comprehensive design system and component library providing UI primitives, icons, logos, and utilities for building modern applications.

results.title: Redbeat
results.description: Redbeat is a Celery Beat scheduler that stores scheduled tasks in Redis, offering a distributed and robust scheduling solution.

results.title: Codebuff
results.description: Codebuff is an open-source AI coding assistant that edits codebases using natural language instructions by coordinating specialized agents for better context understanding and accurate edits.

results.title: redb
results.description: redb is a simple, portable, high-performance, ACID, embedded key-value store written in pure Rust.

results.title: Codebuff
results.description: Codebuff is an AI-powered coding agent that helps developers plan and implement code changes with multiple modes and customizable agents for project-specific workflows.

results.title: RAGatouille
results.description: RAGatouille is a Python library that democratizes state-of-the-art document retrieval using late-interaction methods like ColBERT, enabling semantic keyword matching with just a few lines of code.

results.title: CodeRAG
results.description: CodeRAG is a high-performance code search library offering lightning-fast semantic code search with AST chunking, making it RAG-ready for AI assistants.

results.title: Probe
results.description: Probe is an AI-friendly, fully local semantic code search tool that uses ripgrep and tree-sitter for fast and precise code searching and extraction.

results.title: Canopydb
results.description: Canopydb is an embedded, transactional key-value storage engine optimized for read-heavy and read-modify-write workloads, offering ACID guarantees, an ordered map API, and efficient concurrency.

results.title: Rhubarb Lip Sync
results.description: Rhubarb Lip Sync is a command-line tool that automatically creates 2D mouth animation from voice recordings. You can use it for characters in computer games, in animated cartoons, or in any other project that requires animating mouths based on existing recordings.

results.title: Ragatouille
results.description: RAGatouille makes it easy to use and train state-of-the-art retrieval methods in any RAG pipeline, focusing on simplifying the use of ColBERT.
